name: Dancer
effect: Your alignment switches.

name: Musician
effect: Gain one level.

name: Nista
effect: You disappear, trapped underneath the Temple of Nista (Any location you want... make it a dungeon, or city, or whatever). Player plays a NPC of the DM's choosing until/if the original PC is rescued.

name: Medusa
effect: Medusa Curse: You no longer have saving throws. If your health hits zero, you die.

name: Genie
effect: You can undo one event as if it never happened so far in the campaign. Must use now.

name: Wraith
effect: There is another voice in your head, it speaks occasionally and slowly takes over.

name: Fool
effect: You go down one level and have to draw another card.

name: Merchant
effect: You gain 50,000 gold.

name: Idiot
effect: Reduce Intelligence by 1D6. Draw another card.

name: Drunkard
effect: You are now an alcoholic. If you were already, alcohol is now lethal poison to you.

name: Blacksmith
effect: A rare magic weapon appears in your hands.

name: Knight
effect: A knight walks up and pledges loyalty to you until death. PC controls the companion.

name: Astronomer
effect: You are granted the ability to cast the wish spell once, right now.

name: Rogue
effect: One PC (DM roll to choose) now wants to kill you, at any cost.

name: Marauder
effect: All your equipment, items, gold, and inventory disappear. You never knew they existed.

name: Reaper
effect: Reaper appears and attacks. 1D20+5. 1-6 for body parts (1-left leg (cripple), 2 right leg (cripple), 3 left arm(cripple), 4 right arm(cripple), 5 chest [half the con forever], & 6 head [half the int forever]).

name: Instructor
effect: Increase one ability score by 2.

name: Cavalrymen
effect: You now have a horse. You've always had one. It's your best friend. Name it.

name: Demon
effect: You stab your weapon into your chest. It becomes a very powerful blood-weapon but you must now start making three saving throws to see if you survive the ordeal. No one can help you with any spells or medicine.

name: King
effect: Persuasion skill raises by 2 points. You also now own a castle somewhere in the world (DM chooses specifics).

name: Meditator
effect: You meditate and find truth. Ask the DM one question, any question, and he will answer.

name: The Void
effect: Your soul becomes trapped into whatever item you were holding. You can speak to the holder of that item. Once they pick it up, they are soulbound to it.
